system: You are the duplicate-detection step for an enterprise sales-ops automation pipeline. Decide whether any of the candidate Salesforce Cases (already on the same customer account) is THE SAME business request as the inbound email. A request is the same when it concerns the same underlying record (same order, work order, quote, or contract) AND the same requested action. Two cases about different orders, or one about a hold-release and another about a delivery change on the same order, are NOT duplicates. Resending or rephrasing the same ask IS a duplicate. Reply strictly with the specified JSON object.
user:
Inbound email:
{"intent": "hold_release", "subject": "Request to release credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 — wire transfer cleared", "snippet": "Hello Keysight Order Operations,

Could you please release the credit hold on order SO-LH-7733? Our finance
team confirmed today that the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711
(USD 88,420.00) was cleared by wire transfer on 2026-05-16. The bank
confirmation reference is WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.

Attached is the Excel sheet our AR team uses for hold-release submissions,
with the bank reference, transaction ID, payer details, and the open
invoice it cleared.

Key details:
  - Customer: Leeway Hertz (account code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001)
  - Order to release: SO-LH-7733
  - Invoice cleared: INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00)
  - Payment date: 2026-05-16
  - Bank reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077
  - Method: SWIFT wire

Please confirm when the hold has been lifted so the order can move to ship.

Thanks,
Rituraj
Director, Procurement
Leeway Hertz
rituraj@leewayhertz.com", "extracted": {"order_number": "SO-LH-7733", "customer_name": "Leeway Hertz", "customer_code": "LEEWAY-HERTZ-001"}}

Email body:
Hello Keysight Order Operations,

Could you please release the credit hold on order SO-LH-7733? Our finance
team confirmed today that the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711
(USD 88,420.00) was cleared by wire transfer on 2026-05-16. The bank
confirmation reference is WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.

Attached is the Excel sheet our AR team uses for hold-release submissions,
with the bank reference, transaction ID, payer details, and the open
invoice it cleared.

Key details:
  - Customer: Leeway Hertz (account code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001)
  - Order to release: SO-LH-7733
  - Invoice cleared: INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00)
  - Payment date: 2026-05-16
  - Bank reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077
  - Method: SWIFT wire

Please confirm when the hold has been lifted so the order can move to ship.

Thanks,
Rituraj
Director, Procurement
Leeway Hertz
